productDisplayName: Being Human Men Grey Dial Blue Strap Watch
description: Uber cool and stylish, this limited edition analogue wrist watch from Bollywood superstar Salman Khan's NGO, being human, is designed for those who love heavy metal style. Stylish to the T with a sporty look, it's a great addition to your wardrobe.Case diameter: 50 mmCase thickness: 15 mmDial shape: Round Stainless steel and fibre case with rubber strap for enhanced durability, comfort and style Rubber strap in mat finish with branding for enhanced durability, comfort and style Fixed stainless steel silver and black coloured bezel, with 15, 30, 45 and 60 markings and select minute markings in steel for added durability, style and easy time measurement Fibre holders fixed to the dial with stainless steel screws Metallic tang clasp with branding to hold the watch in place like a buckle, and for style Silver grey dial with black border Fluorescent blue time markings with only '6' and '12' numbered, and white minute markings Luminous hands and index markers for visibility in low light conditions Vertical date and horizontal day box in 'T' shape at '3' mark Branding below '12' mark Japanese movement technology for enhanced durability and accurate time measurement Metallic crown to adjust date/day/time Stainless steel back with brand logo and main features of watch 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming
